case_title: AARON GOLDSMID ET AL VS. MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FEE:$80.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDSMID, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AARON GOLDSMID IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LAURA POSEY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AARON GOLDSMID, HUSBAND.. DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DENNIS DOYLE, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$80.00 SERVED MAY-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDSMID, AARON POSEY, LAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC $770.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, VALUE OF BICYCLES AFTER 75% DEPRECIATION, BICYCLES WERE THREE TO FOUR YEARS OLD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,081.52 FILED BY GOLDSMID, AARON POSEY, LAURA AS TO DEFENDANT MORSE MANAGEMENT, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
